layout.layout_rhythm: scatterbrain: high density, low formality. Post-it inspired: pastel sticky notes, Caveat handwriting, Shrikhand and Zilla Slab type stack.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"slide_pad": "3rem", "post_it_pad_lg": "3rem 4rem", "post_it_pad_md": "2.5rem", "post_it_pad_sm": "1.5rem", "post_it_pad_statement": "3.5rem 4rem", "gap_lg": "3rem", "gap_md": "2.5rem", "gap_sm": "2rem"}

template_json_typography.style: groovy display + handwritten script + warm slab body; reads like a designer's whiteboard

design_tokens_typography.style: groovy display + handwritten script + warm slab body; reads like a designer's whiteboard

typography.typography_role: groovy display + handwritten script + warm slab body; reads like a designer's whiteboard

cjk_policy.known_degradation: Caveat — the system's most distinctive voice (the casual ballpoint hand-script that anchors every personal note) — has no CJK equivalent. There are handwritten-style Chinese web fonts (悠果手写体, 站酷庆科黄油体), but the cultural register of casual cursive handwriting differs sharply between Latin and CJK traditions, and no Chinese face will read as "the same voice as

template_json_palette.description: off-white paper with a full pastel sticky-note palette (yellow, blue, pink, green, orange, purple) and ink-brown text; soft drop shadows everywhere

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: distinctive display face may be approximated by Slide/Source/思源 fonts; preserve weight/size/case first
italic is source-aware but CJK fake italic is forbidden; use color/weight fallback when unavailable
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Shrikhand 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Zilla Slab 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 Shrikhand 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 Shrikhand 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。
font_strategy.same_role_font_justification: 源模板本身以单一 sans/system family 承担多数字体角色；通过 weight/size/line-height/uppercase 区分 display/body/label/metric。

text_transform_policy.raw_value: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation - No period on display headlines - Pangu spacing (盘古之白): `使用 Claude` not `使用Claude` - One font per sentence ### Aesthetic Notes for This System - **The 0.02em positive tracking on Shrikhand display must drop to 0** on ZCOOL KuaiLe. Tracked Chinese display characters look broken. - **Display line-height should open from 1.1 to 1.2–1.3** for ZCOOL KuaiLe — the rounded chunky strokes need more vertical breathing. - **Feature-icon round borders work beaut

line_height_scale.raw_value: tight on display (1.1), generous on body (1.6–1.7), moderate on hand-script (1.3–1.4). italic.source_usage: source uses italic/font-style or italic-family tokens
italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe

italic.raw_value: A friendly modern slab serif with humanist warmth. Multi-weight (300–700, with italic variants 300 and 400).
